name: motorent-pro
description: MotoRent Pro - Motorcycle rental management system

scripts.dev: npm run dev:backend & npm run dev:frontend
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.typecheck: cd backend && npm run typecheck && cd ../frontend && npm run typecheck
scripts.clean: cd backend && npm run clean && cd ../frontend && npm run clean

author: MotoRent Pro
